concerns.analysis: The source PDF contains 25 pages (slides) with distinct content. The output JSON only contains content for pages 1, 2, 3, 8, 24, and 25. It explicitly includes a placeholder element stating that 19 sections were omitted. Missing content includes entire sections on 'Productivity Tools' (Slides 4-6), 'Teams' (Slide 7), 'Accessible Content' (Slides 9-18), 'Accessibility Resources' (Slide 19), 'Get Support' (Slide 20), 'Accessibility Training' (Slide 21), and 'Productivity Tools Links' (Slides 22-23
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Source PDF pages 4-7 and 9-23 contain substantial information and distinct headings (e.g., 'Productivity Tools by Product', 'Accessibility Assistant', 'Alt text', 'Get Support').

concerns.analysis: Multiple meaningful images, screenshots, and illustrative elements are missing from the HTML output. The source PDF uses these images to demonstrate specific software features and accessibility principles. Specifically, screenshots of the Accessibility Assistant (pages 10, 17), illustrative photos (page 11), UI examples for color contrast (page 12), video previews (page 13), status icons (page 14), and GIFs (page 16) are all absent in the rendered HTML, leaving only text descriptions and headers
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 10 (three screenshots of Accessibility Assistant), Page 11 (photo of man in wheelchair), Page 12 (three color contrast boxes), Page 13 (TED talk video screenshot), Page 14 (three Teams status icons), Page 16 (Clippy GIF and emojis), Page 17 (three SharePoint screenshots).
concerns.output_quote: The HTML output displays the text headings and descriptions for these sections, but the images themselves are not rendered. For example, the section 'Convey information' on page 14 mentions symbols that do not appear in the output.
